properties.script:
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, collect_list, lit, concat_ws

df1 = in0.groupBy(col("ItemNumber"))
df2 = df1.pivot("LocationCode")

return df2.agg(sum(col("Sum_AvailableQuantity")).alias("Sum"), lit(1).alias("_dummy_"))

warehouseQuery.query:
select ItemNumber
,ItemDescription
,ItemProductGroupCode
,LocationCode
,InventoryDate
,AvailableQuantity 
,ItemPrimaryVendorID
from da-bi-tableau-prd-mscdirect.PRDViews.InventoryCommOps5Year
where InventoryDate < CURRENT_DATE
AND InventoryDate IN ("9999-11-18")
AND `LocationCode` IN ("ABC123")
and billtosubclass in ("EFG456")
AND AvailableQuantity > 0
